log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Astral Elf — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Astral Elf — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Astral Elf — Winged Striker HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Astral Elf — Winged Striker HP: 38/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Astral Elf — Winged Striker HP: 24/67
--- Astral Elf — Winged Striker --- HP: 24/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
